verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will give thanks to Thee O Lord, among the people I will sing praises to Thee Among the nations For Thy steadfast love is great Is great to the heavens And Thy faithfulness Thy faithfulness to the clouds

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be exalted, O God Above the heavens Let Thy glory be over all the earth Be exalted, O God Above the heavens Let Thy glory be over all the earth
